concerns.text: T017 (validation oracle), T018 (inference), and T019 (training) are listed as implementation tasks in Phase 4, but they depend on the dataset generated by T014 (Phase 3). The current ordering implies these can be implemented in parallel or before data generation is complete. T019 (training) specifically cannot run until T014 produces `data/processed/train_sequences.txt`. The 'Dependencies & Execution Order' section correctly notes US3 must run first, but the task list itself does not enforce this dependency visually or structurally, risking a consumer-before-produce violation if implemented strictly by phase order.

T020 (output parser) is listed in Phase 4 (US1) but depends on the specific format of the generated text sequences defined in T011 (Phase 3). While T011 is in a previous phase, T020 is a consumer of the artifact produced by T011. The task description 'strip conversational filler' implies knowledge of the output format from T011. This is a valid dependency, but the task list should explicitly reference T011 or ensure T020 is not started until T011 is verified.

T024 (baseline runner) and T025 (statistical analysis) depend on the validation scores produced by T022 (Phase 4). The current ordering places them in Phase 5, which is correct, but T024 (baseline) also requires the held-out test set generated in T013/T014 (Phase 3). The dependency chain is T014 -> T022 -> T025. T024 depends on T014 and T018 (inference logic). The current list groups them by US, but the execution order must strictly follow: US3 (Data) -> US1 (Train/Val) -> US2 (Stats). The 'Dependencies' section is correct, but the task list should ensure T024 is not marked as startable until T018 (inference wrapper) is complete, as T024 uses the same inference logic.

T008 mentions 'ensure these schemas are used to validate outputs from T004 and T005'. T004 and T005 are marked [P] (parallel) and in the same phase. If T008 is also [P], it cannot validate outputs that haven't been generated yet. T008 should be ordered AFTER T004 and T005, or the [P] tag should be removed from T008 to indicate it waits for T004/T005 completion.
